summary.para: To use this API, you must have one of the following privileges:

item.para: The manage_security cluster privilege (or a greater privilege such as all).
The "Manage Application Privileges" global privilege for the application being referenced in the request.

summary.para: The name of the application. Application privileges are always associated with exactly one application.

If true (the default) then refresh the affected shards to make this operation visible to search, if wait_for then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search, if false then do nothing with refreshes.
